description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno City will conduct trial soundings for food trucks and similar vendor operations at public facilities. Working with the Okumushi Hanno Tourism Association, the city will run a roughly 3-month trial from April 1, 2026 (Reiwa 8) through June 30, 2026 (Reiwa 8) at vendor areas in public facilities including City Hall, the library, and parks. Vendor participation is limited to association members, and specific vendor information will be announced by the association through social media and other channels. The trial aims to create new business opportunities for private vendors and improve convenience for residents. The city will also gather user satisfaction feedback through surveys. Based on the results, the city will consider rolling out a full program.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/shisankeieika/13132.html
summary: ℹ️ Trial soundings for food trucks and similar vendors at public facilities
